summary: Iteration 14: Backend testing of NEW 'Implant Risk Calculator' endpoint (POST /api/implant-library/calculate-risk). All 21 tests PASSED (100% success rate). Verified: 5-factor risk calculation (Width, Height, Bone Density, Procedure, Tooth Position), score mapping to risk levels (Low 5-7, Moderate 8-11, High 12-15), color coding (green/orange/red), suggested actions generation for high risk cases, and regression test confirming existing suggest endpoint unchanged.
critical_code_review_comments: Risk scoring logic correctly implemented for all 5 factors
Bone Density: D1=1, D2=1, D3=2, D4=3 - correctly maps all 4 bone types
Tooth Position: Anterior(1,2,3)=1, Premolar(4,5)=2, Molar(6,7)=3 - uses unit digit correctly
Risk levels correctly mapped: Low(5-7)/green, Moderate(8-11)/orange, High(12-15)/red
Suggested actions array properly populated based on individual factor scores and total score
Input validation returns 400 for missing/empty required fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Risk calculator endpoint fully tested. All scoring rules validated: Width/Height based on remaining bone, Density D1-D4, Procedure types (6 total), Tooth position by FDI unit digit. Total score 5-15 maps to Low/Moderate/High risk with color coding. Suggested actions generated for moderate/high risk cases. Existing /api/implant-library/suggest endpoint unchanged (requires system, brand params).

response_structure.factors: 5-element array with factor, remaining/detail, risk label, score
response_structure.suggested_actions: array of action strings for moderate/high risk
